name: Timer Plugin
description: Timer and reminder functionality for BRIKA

set.name: Set Timer
set.description: Set a timer that fires after the specified duration

list.name: List Timers
list.description: List all active timers with remaining time

cancel.name: Cancel Timer
cancel.description: Cancel an active timer by ID or name

clear.name: Clear All
clear.description: Clear all active timers at once

target.label: Target
target.description: Timer ID or name to cancel
